message:
feat: add PullHooks/PushHooks to SyncEngine for battle-tested CLI behaviors

Phase 3 of tracker refactor (dolt-y60t.3). Adds optional hook callbacks
to the Engine so tracker adapters can opt into proven CLI patterns:

PullHooks: ShouldImport (filter before conversion), TransformIssue
(description formatting/normalization), GenerateID (hash-based IDs).

PushHooks: ShouldPush (custom filtering), ContentEqual (content-hash
dedup to skip unnecessary API calls), FormatDescription (tracker-specific
rendering), BuildStateCache/ResolveState (batch workflow state resolution).

Also adds ExcludeEphemeral to SyncOptions for wisp filtering on push.

Dropped from original plan: tombstone filtering (Dolt handles natively),
UseImporter delegation (importer package tied to dying JSONL/SQLite infra).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
